channel.title: Vintage Story Mod DB - Latest Updates
channel.description: Newest mod releases and updates from the Vintage Story Mod DB

item.title: LoFS Classes
item.description: Working Classes reimagined for the Lands of the Fallen Stars RP Event! Image Unrelated

item.title: Specialized Classes
item.description: 15 new classes that are the best in their fields by a large margin, with major but specific buffs

item.title: Julz Addons
item.description: A smol mod made for my mates to have fun in VS

item.title: VS Director
item.description: A director camera mod for video production workflows.（导演模式模组）

item.title: Mosin's Rapiers Fixed
item.description: Adds only the rapiers from mosin's armory, with integrated Quivers and Sheaths support

item.title: The Hunter
item.description: Adds animal tracking clues, bleeding, droppings, wounded movement, and carcass carrying.

item.title: TentBag-Reworked
item.description: Adds a tent bag for Vintage Story with scaling hunger cost based on tent complexity

item.title: Ambien's Easy Chunk Claim
item.description: Simple chunk claiming made for servers

item.title: fish(wastaken)'s Classes
item.description: some classes I made, using features taken from GlooMeClasses and Rustbound Magic.

item.title: fish(wastaken)'s GlooMe Patch
item.description: small patch for GlooMeClasses to make it better fit my personal tastes.

item.title: Akira's Tweaks
item.description: Collection of patches for a personal server.

item.title: (Not) Just Tofu
item.description: Simple, realistic tofu & miso making process for better vegan protein & dairy food and meal options.

item.title: Burdened
item.description: A weightier carrying experience: customizable slots, immersive carrying, server-enforced, and more.

item.title: Meliora Meadows Adjustments
item.description: Adjusts A LOT of mods, applying Aldi's Classes trait restrictions and disabling some jsons.

item.title: Vampirism
item.description: Become a creature of the night, drink blood, see in the dark and never touch silver again

item.title: Dishware
item.description: Adds ceramic dishes such as plates and cups.

item.title: Fast Travel NPC
item.description: Allows players to fast travel in the world by paying rusty gears.

item.title: Vintage Rift - Client
item.description: Client only code for the Vintage Rift server

item.title: Jelly Bundle
item.description: A compilation of tweaks for the Swamp Jelly server.

item.title: Tethys Tweaks
item.description: Tweaks for a personal private server.

item.title: aged wood fix
item.description: fixes aged wood textures path

item.title: Zenith: Assimilation
item.description: Forge your path to Apotheosis. Consume Creatures, take their traits and become the ultimate lifeform

item.title: Elk Adornments
item.description: Masks for you and your elk with Modular Elk Armor!

item.title: ClickLock (Accessibility Mod)
item.description: Adds accessibility features to lock mouse clicks (Auto-Click/Hold) with customizable settings

item.title: Antique Harmony | Music Additions / Alternative Soundtrack
item.description: Adds to/replaces soundtrack with original orchestral one, written for the game.

item.title: Animalica - Compatibility
item.description: Adds a small list of modded animals as players!

item.title: CompostTweak
item.description: Makes composting alot more interactive and adds more things to compost.

item.title: Hydrate or Diedrate
item.description: A mod that adds thirst and hydration mechanics as well as hot weather survival.

item.title: Cool Weapons Pack
item.description: A mod where I just add weapons I think are cool and friends have requested. It should be CO compat

item.title: [Infinitum] Trader Editor
item.description: A graphical editor for individual vanilla traders. Customize each trader directly in-game.
